segments.text: Am I the asshole for not wanting to babysit my sister's kids anymore?
So here's the deal.
I love my sister and all, but she's been taking advantage of me for way too long.
I live pretty close by to her, and my job gives me some flexibility in terms of hours.
But lately, my sister's been using me as her kid's full-time babysitter without asking if I'm okay with it.
Quick rundown.
She's got twins, age six, who are bundles of energy, nonstop.
Taking care of them is no small task, but hey, they're my nephews, and I love them.
It all started when my sister got a new job about four months ago.
It was further away and she was stuck for childcare.
I offered to help her out in the mornings and afternoons.
She happily agreed, and for a while, things were good.
The boys and I had fun, and it was nice being the cool uncle.
But over time, she started leaving them with me for longer periods.
turning days into weekends, and now it's become pretty much all the time.
I've hardly got any time for myself, my own friends or my work.
What really had me heated, though, was last month.
I had planned a small getaway with my buddies, just for the weekend.
Told my sis well in advance.
But lo and behold, the day before I'm supposed to leave, she drops an absolute bomb on me.
She'd booked tickets for a spa weekend for herself and was leaving the boys with me.
No questions, no options, just assumed I'd do it.
But I didn't.
I stuck to my plans and left town, and so she had to scramble to find another solution last minute.

She's been super angry ever since, telling me that I'm supposed to help family out and stuff, but I think she's just mad because she had to find another babysitter when I wasn't there to be her free solution.
Besides, I really don't think it's fair for her to assume I'd always be free to babysit just because I can work flexible hours.
I should also mention that she's never once offered to compensate me for my time or even thank me.
It feels like she's just taking me for granted.
with all the nagging and guilt tripping, got me second guessing.
Am I the asshole here?
